free_text: Spectroscopy of F-16 from the O-16(p,n)F-16 reaction
A 47.4 mg/cm**2 Be-9-O-16 target was used.
Particle-hole amplitudes was calculated. A shell-model
prediction and analysis of the neutron angular
NE-102 neutron detectors were 1.02 m long by
0.102 m thick. For measurements at 99.1 MeV,the neutron
detectors were located in stations at 68.1 and 76.3 m
from the target along the 0 and 24 degr. lines,
paths were 90.9,90.8 and 73.4 m for the detectors at
uncertainties plus a contribution for the accuracy of
the fitting procedure obtained from the error matrix
of the fitting program. If there are no bars on figure,
DATA-ERR means half of the point's size.
. data sections are corrected for authors
